features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You can cast Ranger spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a list of spells and can use a Druidic Focus as a spellcasting focus. Ranger spellcasting now begins at level 1.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: You always have the Hunter's Mark spell prepared. You can cast it a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once) without expending a spell slot, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description: You gain the ability to use the mastery properties of two kinds of weapons of your choice.

features.name: Deft Explorer
features.description: You gain Expertise in one of your skill proficiencies and you learn two additional languages.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice. If you later gain a new Fighting Style feat, you can replace this one with a different one.

features.name: Ranger Subclass
features.description: You choose a Ranger Archetype. Your subclass grants you features at level 3 and again at levels 7, 11, and 15.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Roving
features.description: Your walking speed increases by 5 feet, and you gain a climbing speed and a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Expertise
features.description: You gain Expertise in two more of your skill proficiencies.

features.name: Tireless
features.description: As an action, you can give yourself Temporary Hit Points equal to 1d8 + your Wisdom modifier. You can use this action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Additionally, your exhaustion level decreases by 1 whenever you finish a Short Rest.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Relentless Hunter
features.description: Your focus on your Hunter's Mark target is so intense that your concentration on the spell cannot be broken by taking damage.

features.name: Nature's Veil
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can magically become Invisible until the end of your next turn. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

features.name: Subclass feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen Ranger Archetype.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Precise Hunter
features.description: You have Advantage on attack rolls against the creature currently marked by your Hunter's Mark spell.

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description: You gain Blindsight out to a range of 30 feet.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: Your Hunter's Mark damage increases from 1d6 to 1d10.
